CustomField.description: The fallback result to use if strategies *exist*, but *none* of them return true. If true, the flag is ON. If false (default), the flag is OFF. This field is *only* used if at least one strategy exists and all strategies fail to match.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The fallback value to use when a user doesn't match any of the defined strategy rules. Check this to enable the feature for all non-matching users. Leave unchecked (default) to disable it.
CustomField.label: Result On No Match
